name: cxmt
tagline: Empowering the Digital World with Innovative Memory Solutions
description: CXMT (ChangXin Memory Technologies) is China's leading DRAM memory manufacturer, specializing in the design, production, and sales of high-performance DRAM chips. The company offers comprehensive memory solutions including DDR5, LPDDR5X, DDR4, and LPDDR4X products for data centers, PCs, mobile devices, and embedded applications.
longDescription: CXMT (ChangXin Memory Technologies) is a world-class integrated device manufacturer (IDM) focused on DRAM memory technology. Founded in 2016 and headquartered in Hefei, China, CXMT has established itself as a key player in the global memory market. The company operates advanced 12-inch wafer fabrication facilities and offers a comprehensive portfolio of DRAM products including DDR5, LPDDR5X, DDR4, and LPDDR4X memory solutions. CXMT's products serve diverse markets including data centers, enterprise servers, personal computers, laptops, mobile devices, and embedded systems. With cutting-edge technology nodes and world-class manufacturing capabilities, CXMT is committed to providing high-quality, reliable memory products that meet the growing demands of the digital economy. The company's DDR5 products achieve speeds up to 8000Mbps, while LPDDR5X reaches 10667Mbps, positioning CXMT at the forefront of memory technology innovation.

coreProducts.name: DDR5 Memory
coreProducts.description: High-performance DDR5 DRAM with speeds up to 8000Mbps, available in 16Gb and 24Gb densities for servers, PCs, and workstations

coreProducts.name: LPDDR5X Memory
coreProducts.description: Ultra-low power LPDDR5X mobile memory with speeds up to 10667Mbps for flagship smartphones and mobile devices

coreProducts.description: Mainstream DDR4 DRAM solutions with high reliability for enterprise and consumer applications

coreProducts.name: LPDDR4/LPDDR4X Memory
coreProducts.description: Power-efficient mobile DRAM for smartphones, tablets, and IoT devices

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of CXMT products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of CXMT (ChangXin Memory Technologies) products. We provide genuine CXMT DRAM memory chips including DDR5, LPDDR5X, DDR4, and LPDDR4X series with full technical support. As an authorized distributor, we maintain strategic inventory of popular CXMT memory products for quick delivery. Our technical team has extensive experience with CXMT memory solutions and can provide application guidance, compatibility verification, and design support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong sales for CXMT product inquiries, samples, and technical support. We can help you select the right CXMT memory solution for your application.

faqs.question: What are the core competitive advantages of CXMT DRAM products?
faqs.answer: CXMT DRAM products offer several competitive advantages: (1) Advanced technology - DDR5 up to 8000Mbps and LPDDR5X up to 10667Mbps, among the industry's highest speeds; (2) High capacity - 24Gb DDR5 and 16Gb LPDDR5X densities for demanding applications; (3) Comprehensive portfolio - complete range from DDR4 to DDR5, LPDDR4X to LPDDR5X; (4) Quality and reliability - manufactured in world-class 12-inch fabs with rigorous testing; (5) Cost-effectiveness - competitive pricing compared to international brands; (6) Local support - fast response technical support and shorter lead times; (7) Supply security - stable supply chain reducing dependency on overseas suppliers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider CXMT for cost-sensitive applications requiring high-performance memory. Contact our technical team for comparison with other memory solutions.

faqs.question: How do CXMT products compare to international brands like Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron?
faqs.answer: CXMT products offer competitive alternatives to international memory brands: (1) Performance - CXMT DDR5 at 8000Mbps and LPDDR5X at 10667Mbps match or exceed mainstream offerings from Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron; (2) Technology - 16Gb and 24Gb densities comparable to industry standards; (3) Quality - manufactured to same JEDEC standards with equivalent reliability; (4) Cost - typically 10-20% lower pricing than tier-1 international brands; (5) Supply - local manufacturing provides supply chain security; (6) Support - faster technical support response in local language. For most applications, CXMT provides equivalent functionality at better value with reduced supply risk.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate CXMT for cost optimization and supply security. Our technical team can provide detailed comparisons for your specific requirements.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing CXMT products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing CXMT products through LiTong offers multiple advantages: (1) Genuine products - guaranteed authentic CXMT memory with full traceability; (2) Technical support - experienced team with deep knowledge of CXMT memory solutions; (3) Application guidance - assistance with memory selection, compatibility verification, and design review; (4) Reference designs - access to proven memory implementations; (5) Fast delivery - strategic inventory of popular CXMT products; (6) Competitive pricing - volume discounts and flexible payment terms; (7) Local service - Chinese language support and local technical seminars; (8) Quality assurance - full testing and validation support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for CXMT product quotes, samples, and technical support. We can help accelerate your memory product development.

faqs.question: What applications are CXMT DRAM products best suited for?
faqs.answer: CXMT DRAM products are optimized for diverse applications: (1) Data centers - DDR5 RDIMM, MRDIMM for servers requiring high capacity and bandwidth; (2) Enterprise servers - DDR5 UDIMM, RDIMM for reliable enterprise computing; (3) PCs and laptops - DDR5 UDIMM, SODIMM for desktops and notebooks; (4) Mobile devices - LPDDR5X for flagship smartphones and tablets; (5) AI and ML - high-bandwidth DDR5 for AI training and inference; (6) Embedded systems - LPDDR4X for IoT and industrial applications; (7) High-performance computing - DDR5 with speeds up to 8000Mbps for HPC applications. CXMT offers complete memory solutions from cloud to edge.
faqs.decisionGuide: Share your memory application requirements with our technical team for CXMT product selection guidance and reference design recommendations.

faqs.question: What DDR5 memory products does CXMT offer?
faqs.answer: CXMT offers comprehensive DDR5 memory portfolio: (1) Die densities - 16Gb and 24Gb DDR5 DRAM chips; (2) Speed grades - up to 8000Mbps, with 6400Mbps and 7200Mbps options; (3) Module types - UDIMM for desktops, SODIMM for laptops, RDIMM for servers, MRDIMM for high-performance servers; (4) Advanced modules - CUDIMM/CSODIMM with clock drivers for enhanced performance; (5) Form factors - standard and TFF (Tall Form Factor) options; (6) Applications - data centers, enterprise servers, workstations, gaming PCs. CXMT DDR5 products are fully JEDEC compliant and compatible with Intel and AMD platforms supporting DDR5.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical team for DDR5 selection based on your platform, capacity, and performance requirements.

faqs.question: What LPDDR5X products does CXMT offer for mobile applications?
faqs.answer: CXMT LPDDR5X portfolio for mobile devices: (1) Die densities - 12Gb and 16Gb LPDDR5X chips; (2) Speed grades - 8533Mbps, 9600Mbps, and 10667Mbps; (3) Package options - standalone dies, packaged MCP (Multi-Chip Package), and module solutions; (4) Capacity configurations - 12GB, 16GB, 24GB, 32GB in various package formats; (5) Module types - LPCAMM2 modules for next-generation laptops; (6) Power efficiency - optimized for flagship smartphones, tablets, and AI edge devices; (7) Compatibility - backward compatible with LPDDR5. CXMT LPDDR5X delivers industry-leading performance for premium mobile applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our mobile memory specialists for LPDDR5X selection based on your device requirements.

faqs.question: How do I select the right CXMT memory for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right CXMT memory involves considering: (1) Application type - data center, PC, mobile, or embedded; (2) Memory standard - DDR5 for new designs, DDR4 for legacy compatibility; (3) Capacity requirements - based on system needs and future expansion; (4) Speed grade - match to platform memory controller capabilities; (5) Form factor - UDIMM, SODIMM, RDIMM, or LPDDR package; (6) Power requirements - standard or low-power options; (7) Platform compatibility - verify with Intel/AMD CPU or mobile SoC; (8) Operating conditions - temperature range and reliability requirements. LiTong's technical team can analyze your requirements and recommend the optimal CXMT memory solution.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong technical team with your system specifications for personalized CXMT memory selection guidance.
